headlines.headline: Prynis Systems recalls products in supply chain optimization line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall indicates immediate operational disruption and potential reputational damage that will likely persist as the company manages the logistics of the recall.

headlines.headline: Frelol Software opens new office in Scandinavia

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office is a strategic expansion move that signals growth but typically has a neutral to slightly positive impact on short-term financial performance.

headlines.headline: Prynis Systems reports record quarterly revenue, up 10% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 10% is a strong, quantifiable indicator of positive financial health and market demand.

headlines.headline: Kelvos Resources to present at Tech Leadership Conference

sentiment.reasoning: Presenting at a conference is a standard corporate activity that rarely results in immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Prynis Systems reports rising costs pressuring margins in data analytics

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs pressuring margins directly impacts profitability and is a negative signal for the company's bottom line.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
